name: YNAB MCP Server
what_it_does: YNAB (You Need A Budget) MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with the YNAB personal budgeting app — querying budget categories and balances, reviewing transactions, tracking spending patterns, and integrating YNAB's envelope budgeting system into agent-driven personal finance analysis and planning workflows.
use_cases: Querying budget category balances from personal finance agents
Reviewing recent transactions for spending analysis from budget agents
Checking budget status and overspending from accountability agents
Analyzing spending patterns across categories from financial planning agents
Tracking savings goals progress from goal management agents
Building AI financial advisors with YNAB data from coaching agents
not_for: Teams not using YNAB (use Mint or other PFM app MCPs)
Automated transaction categorization (YNAB is for manual budgeting)
Businesses — YNAB is personal budgeting only
best_when: A YNAB user wants AI assistance with budget analysis — querying spending, tracking categories, and getting insights from their envelope budgeting data.
avoid_when: You use Mint, Monarch Money, or other PFM tools — use the appropriate MCP.

auth.notes: YNAB Personal Access Token required. Generate from YNAB account settings → Developer Settings. Token provides access to all budgets in the account.

pricing.notes: YNAB requires subscription after trial. Community MCP is free. YNAB API is free for YNAB subscribers.

known_agent_gotchas: YNAB subscription required ($15/month) in addition to free MCP
Personal Access Token has full account read/write access — no scope limitation
YNAB API rate limit (200 req/hour) can be hit with frequent agent queries
Community MCP — YNAB API is well-documented
Financial data is sensitive — budget details reveal personal spending patterns
YNAB does not support transaction import via API — read and category management only
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Personal access token. Community MCP. Personal financial data is sensitive — treat token with care.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. Personal access token. Community MCP. Personal financial data — handle sensitively.
